name: Tag
description: A tag component for labeling, categorizing, or highlighting content with optional prefix and suffix elements.
usage_guidelines: Use for labels, categories, or status indicators.
Add prefix for icons or indicators before text.
Add suffix for icons or indicators after text.
Use for filtering or selection interfaces.
Keep tag text concise and scannable.

prefix.description: Prefix element or boolean for default prefix.

suffix.description: Suffix element or boolean for default suffix.

styling_info.visual_description: A small pill-shaped label with rounded corners. Supports prefix and suffix elements. Typically uses muted background colors.
